ip_outcome_note: Card name, art, and species confirmed as Mankey via PokemonTCG.io API (swsh8-133). Internal Pokemon IP — no external crossover risk.

trivia_bullets.text: Mankey (National Pokedex no. 56) is a Generation I Fighting-type introduced in 1996. Official species classification: Pig Monkey Pokemon. Design blends primate anatomy with a pig-like snout.

Mankey evolves into Primeape at level 28. In Generation IX (Scarlet and Violet, 2022), Primeape received a third-stage evolution: Annihilape, a Fighting/Ghost dual-type. Primeape must use the move Rage Fist (learned at level 35) exactly 20 times then gain a level to trigger the evolution. The Ghost typing was narratively grounded in Primeape's Sun Pokedex entry stating Primeape can die of rage — Annihilape literalizes that as a spirit.
sources: dexerto.com Annihilape evolution guide via WebSearch

trivia_bullets.text: "If one gets angry, all the others around it will get angry, so silence is a rare visitor in a troop of Mankey."

related_cards.name: Annihilape
related_cards.note: Generation IX final evolution; Fighting/Ghost; triggers from Rage Fist mechanic
